channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I tested the DJI Osmo Mobile 8P — and DJI has fixed the one thing holding its smartphone gimbal back
item.description: One small improvement over its predecessor makes the Osmo Mobile 8P the new go-to small stabilizer for smartphones.

item.title: Switch 2 : Nintendo annonce une hausse de prix, une console aussi chère que la PS5
item.description: Nintendo a annoncé une hausse de prix pour la Switch 2 en Europe. Le nouveau prix entrera en vigueur à partir du 1er septembre 2026. Au Japon, les anciens modèles de Switch et les abonnements au Nintendo Online augmenteront également de prix. Cette tendance à l'augmentation des prix des consoles se renforce, après celle annoncée par PlayStation.

item.title: 'Threat actors are clearly adapting to the widespread interest in popular AI tools': AI fans beware, hackers create a fake Claude site to spread backdoor malware
item.description: Sophos found a fake Claude website deploying a simple but effective RAT.

item.title: The studio that (technically) made Disco Elysium just dropped a trailer for its new game
item.description: Zero Parades: For Dead Spies comes out on May 21.

item.title: Panneaux solaires plug-and-play à brancher : combien pouvez-vous vraiment économiser sur votre facture ?
item.description: Si vous voulez produire votre propre électricité solaire, vous avez forcément envisagé de choisir un kit prêt à brancher. Mais avant de sortir la carte bleue, voici ce que vous devez savoir.

item.title: Pentagon releases UFO files on new website
item.description: The Defense Department has released a collection of UFO files with images, videos, and documents on war.gov/ufo.

item.title: Home Depot's Spring Sale feels like Memorial Day has already arrived — 40% off patio furniture, grills, appliances, tools and more
item.description: Home Depot's spring sale feels like Memorial Day has arrived, thanks to huge savings on patio furniture, grills, lawn mowers, appliances, and more.

item.title: Google Fitbit Air preorders come with a second band for free
item.description: Google’s new Fitbit Air, the $99.99 screenless fitness tracker, comes out on May 26th. It’s the company’s first Fitbit release in four years, and you can use it on iOS or Android phones without a paid subscription if all you want to do is track activities, sleep, and basic health metrics (heart rate, breathing rate, […]

item.title: The Beats Powerbeats Pro 2 are some of the best headphones for endurance runners — and they're now back to the Black Friday price at Amazon
item.description: Best for runners and long-workout enthusiasts

item.title: Elle peut recharger un iPhone 17 Pro plus de quatre fois : cette batterie externe 25 000 mAh chute sous les 90 €
item.description: Puissante, offrant une capacité de 25 000 mAh et dotée de deux ports et de deux câbles USB-C, la batterie externe Ugreen Nexode Pro est tout à fait capable de recharger rapidement plusieurs appareils simultanément. Actuellement, Amazon la propose à 89,99 euros au lieu de 129,99 euros.

item.title: Everyone should follow Logitech and put extra USB ports on iPad keyboard cases
item.description: Logitech is introducing a new feature to its rugged iPad Combo 4 keyboard case that addresses an ongoing issue with the tablet as Apple continues to push it toward being a laptop alternative. The new Rugged Combo 4c and 4c Touch cases, compatible with the 10th and 11th-gen iPads, add a second USB-C port to […]

item.title: Microsoft was worried OpenAI would run off to Amazon and ‘shit-talk’ Azure
item.description: When OpenAI was busy experimenting with AI-powered gaming bots, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman were in the early days of forming an AI partnership. Court documents from the ongoing Musk v. Altman trial have provided a rare look at the communications between Microsoft's top executives about investing in OpenAI and fears […]

item.title: The company that owns Moog, Akai Pro, and Numark is buying Native Instruments
item.description: Native Instruments' suite of music production software and gear, including Traktor and Kontakt, will soon live under the inMusic umbrella alongside other music tech brands like Akai Professional and Moog Music. As MusicRadar reports, Native Instruments CEO Nick Williams said the company was looking for a buyer in March, following news it had entered bankruptcy […]...

item.title: This dangerous 'CallPhantom' scam spread across 28 Google Play apps downloaded over 7 million times - here's what we know
item.description: Fake Google Play apps were promising access to people's call logs and required subscriptions.

item.title: How to watch The Android Show: Google I/O Edition on May 12
item.description: Watch the entire event unfold on YouTube.

item.title: 'We must think carefully about what we will do': Sony shows hesitance to announce PS6 release date or price due to RAM crisis, and finds itself in the same situation Valve is in with the Steam Machine
item.description: Sony is hesitant to announce a PS6 release date or price, and is going through extensive consideration over it amid the disruptive RAM crisis.

item.title: 'The findings are sobering': Experts warn nearly half of the world's passwords can easily be cracked in just a few minutes
item.description: Kaspersky researchers conducted real world testing and found that almost half of passwords can be cracked in less than a minute.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 price hikes are coming and you can thank the AI data center building boom
item.description: A global shortage of random access memory (RAM) is having an impact on gaming companies, with costs getting passed onto consumers. If you’ve been debating whether or not to pick up a Nintendo Switch 2 then you’ll want to act soon.

item.title: Sony and Bandai get into bed with generative AI
item.description: The company also outlined AI's role in the future of PlayStation.

item.title: Nick Bostrom Has a Plan for Humanity’s ‘Big Retirement’
item.description: The philosopher thinks humans should pursue advanced AI and the promise of a “solved world.”

item.title: There’s a Long-Shot Proposal to Protect California Workers From AI
item.description: California gubernatorial candidate Tom Steyer is proposing a new jobs guarantee for workers displaced by artificial intelligence.

item.title: Test de la reMarkable Paper Pure : un retour à l’essentiel gagnant ?
item.description: Après les colorées Paper Pro et Paper Pro Move, place à la Paper Pure, qui, comme son nom le suggère, tient à revenir à l'essentiel. Cette nouvelle « tablette papier » se déleste du superflu pour se concentrer sur la promesse originelle de la marque : une expérience d'écriture papier sans distraction, mais à un prix plus accessible.

item.title: How to watch VRT outside Belgium – from anywhere with a VPN
item.description: Here's how to watch VRT from outside Belgium, and learn how to access streams from anywhere abroad with a VPN.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 officially gets a $50 price hike in the US
item.description: Just like everything else under the sun, the Nintendo Switch 2 just became more expensive.

item.title: Govee’s solar-powered string lights are already on sale for 20 percent off
item.description: I’m not sure if we’ve mentioned this yet, but Govee has been on a tear lately, having recently announced everything from rechargeable table lamps to multicolor, Matter-compatible ceiling lights that can display custom images with retro, pixelated flair. In April, the company also unveiled a 34-foot set of Outdoor Solar String Lights, which are now […]...

item.title: Truecaller slashes 70 jobs amid declining ad sales
item.description: Truecaller's ad revenue declined by 44%, leading to the layoffs.

item.title: Why AI auditability is what every security leader should be talking about
item.description: There was a time when "audit" meant conducting a periodic look back at what happened. That changed with digital transformation.

item.title: The future of game consoles is looking bleak
item.description: It's been a real good news / bad news week for Nintendo. Out of nowhere on Wednesday, the company announced a lush remake of Star Fox 64, jolting the dormant franchise to life and helping to fill out a relatively sparse lineup for the Switch 2 for the rest of the year. But then on […]

item.title: Live only at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Why most founders are already behind on raising a Series A in 2027
item.description: Learn what it takes to build a Series A in 2027 from top VCs at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, taking place at San Francisco’s Moscone West on October 13-15. Register today to hear this session live on the Builders Stage.

item.title: How to watch Borussia Dortmund vs. Eintracht Frankfurt online for free
item.description: How to watch Bundesliga for free. Watch Borussia Dortmund vs. Eintracht Frankfurt in the Bundesliga for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Nintendo is raising the price of the Switch 2 — where to buy before the hike hits
item.description: Nintendo is raising the price of the Switch 2 by $50 this September, but you can still snag it for $449.99 at retailers like Amazon, Target, and Best Buy if you move fast.

item.title: OpenAI rolls out new model for cybersecurity teams a month after Anthropic's Mythos debut
item.description: GPT-5.5-Cyber is now available to TAC members, but it's a slight upgrade from 5.4.
